properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I slipped through the gates of pearl, as Peter greeted me; And one by one I met the saints I'd longed so much to see, I saw my heroes Stephen, Paul, and Timothy; But before my breath could find the words, I heard them speak to me,

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: "Are you She, the Bride of the last days, Who stood the worst of times, when so many slipped away? Here's your crown, take your place beside the Throne, Christ is now your very own; Is this the special Chosen One we see, are you She?"

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: "It was the worst of all the ages," they continued to say, "How did you live a Christian life in such a godless day?" Question after question, my heroes lifted me; Then I heard a Voice behind me, whisper tenderly,

verse.name: V4
V5
verse.lines: These trials that you're facing may seem so big and tall, But when we hear the Master speak, It'll make it worth it all; (worth it all)

verse.name: V6
